name: Locus Fish with Jerusalem Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the Jerusalem artichokes.
2. Melt butter and olive oil together in a pan. Fry the fish fillets for 3 minutes on each side. Set aside, keeping warm.
3. Add the wine to the same pan, scraping the bottom of the pan.
4. Add rosemary, lemon juice, sliced Jerusalem artichokes, heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Cook until the Jerusalem artichokes soften and the sauce reduces to a half, about 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
5. Transfer the fish fillets to serving plates. Pour the sauce over the fish and garnish with rosemary sprigs.
